name: Paydock
description: Enterprise payment orchestration platform connecting unlimited PSPs via one API and dashboard.

seo.title: Paydock — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Paydock: Enterprise payment orchestration platform connecting unlimited PSPs via one API and dashboard.

when_to_use: Connecting unlimited PSPs via a single orchestration API
Smart routing rules across enterprise PSP portfolio
Real-time transaction monitoring and retry logic across providers

pros: Unlimited PSP connectors via one API
Handles cards, APMs, and wallets under one flow
cons: US market presence thinner than Primer
review.verdict: Strong enterprise orchestrator, especially in APAC; less compelling if you want a US-style self-serve SaaS.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large enterprises in APAC, UK, and Europe unifying many PSPs under one contract.
review.not_for: Startups and SMBs wanting a low-friction, self-serve sign-up and flat pricing.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
